name: Crypto Ticker
description: Live cryptocurrency prices and charts on your Even G2 lens. Streams real-time prices from Binance for up to 9 cryptocurrencies, with a hands-free detail view that includes a line chart over 24h, 1W, 1M, 1Y, or all-time. Configure your watchlist and quote currency from the companion app; navigate, drill into a coin, and exit the app entirely with the touchpad. No personal data collected; only public Binance APIs are contacted.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Streams live crypto prices from Binance and fetches historical chart data.
